bullet_points: Load the dataset
Split into 'Elasticity-Known' (90) and 'Elasticity-Unknown' (112) subsets
Print dataset statistics (missing values, G_vrh distribution)
Perform iterative imputation for dos_at_fermi using a BayesianRidge estimator (fit only on training folds)
One-hot encode categorical features (magnetic_ordering, crystal_system, phase)
Standardize continuous features
Z-score normalize G_vrh
Save the processed datasets and feature list
Construct a neural network with a shared feature extraction backbone and two output heads (regression for G_vrh, classification for is_stable)
Implement homoscedastic uncertainty weighting
Train using LOGO cross-validation (grouped by 'Periodic Table Group')
Record/print per-fold metrics (MAE, RMSE, R², accuracy, ROC-AUC) and the correlation between predicted G_vrh and energy_above_hull
Retrain the final model on the full 90-sample dataset
Save the learned uncertainty weights (sigma_1, sigma_2)
Perform Monte Carlo sensitivity analysis (500 forward passes, fixed seed) with jittered input features
Calculate per-sample mean/std of predicted G_vrh
Calculate the 'High-Correlation Sensitivity' flag (threshold: d_band_filling > 0.5, magnetic ordering in [FM, FiM])
Generate a plot of uncertainty (std of MC predictions) vs. d_band_filling
Save uncertainty metrics and sensitivity flags
Compute 'Mechanical Viability' threshold (mean + 1 std of stable population G_vrh) and 'Specific Shear Modulus' (using density from volume_per_atom and molar mass)
Perform 'leave-one-metal-out' robustness check on the top 10 candidates (retrain model excluding each metal, record changes in predicted G_vrh, flag candidates with >20% change)
Generate a 2D probability map (predicted G_vrh vs. energy_above_hull, color-coded by uncertainty, marker-coded by sensitivity flag)
Generate a secondary plot of G_vrh vs. d_band_filling
Rank/save the final prioritization list (CSV)
sub_tasks.sub_task: Mechanical Viability Mapping and Robustness Check

bullet_points: Synthesize findings from the mechanical viability mapping and sensitivity analysis
Report quantitative cross-validation metrics
Discuss learned uncertainty weights
Interpret the MC uncertainty map and leave-one-metal-out robustness check results
Provide a physical narrative connecting d_band_filling, magnetic ordering, and mechanical softening
Write the full Results section of the report, summarizing model performance, identified candidates, and synthesis novelty status
sub_tasks.sub_task: Final Robustness Check and Results Reporting
